idea-plugin.name: CSS Glyph Preview
idea-plugin.description:
Preview icon-font glyphs right in the editor — in CSS/SCSS and HTML. Works with any icon font that ships a CSS map with codepoints: FontAwesome, Material Design Icons, LineIcons, Linearicons, Unicons, CoreUI Icons, and more.

In CSS / SCSS:

  • Gutter preview next to every content: "\fXXXX" declaration. The rule's font-family (SCSS variables, incl. @use namespaces, are resolved) and font-weight decide which font is used.
  • Icon picker in the content value, searchable by icon name, each item showing its glyph. Selecting an icon inserts the escape and, if needed, sets the required font-weight so it also renders in the browser.

In HTML (and templates such as Twig):

  • Gutter preview next to <i class="fas fa-pencil">.
  • Icon-font class completions show the glyph inline — existing suggestions are decorated, not duplicated.

Hovering an icon (Quick Documentation) shows a larger preview.

You register your own icon fonts (.ttf/.otf) plus their CSS name map under Settings > Tools > CSS Glyph Preview — the map is auto-detected next to the font when possible. Selected files are copied into the IDE config folder, so they keep working after the originals are deleted.

Requires an IDE with bundled CSS support (IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, WebStorm, PhpStorm, PyCharm Professional, etc.). Only bitmap/vector icon fonts with an @font-face codepoint map are supported — SVG-sprite icon sets are not. Not affiliated with or endorsed by any of the icon-set projects mentioned.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0

  • HTML support: gutter preview for <i class="fas fa-pencil">, and icon-decorated class completions (no duplicate entries). Works in templates such as Twig.
  • Any icon font, not just FontAwesome: Material Design Icons, LineIcons, Linearicons, Unicons, CoreUI Icons, etc. The name map is auto-detected next to the font when adding it.
  • Hover preview (Quick Documentation) showing a larger glyph in CSS and HTML.
  • SCSS variable resolution now handles @use namespaces (v.$font-awesome).

1.0.0

  • Initial public release.
  • Gutter glyph preview for CSS/SCSS content declarations.
  • Searchable icon picker with automatic font-weight insertion.
  • FontAwesome 6/7 (--fa) and legacy ::before metadata parsing.
  • Project-wide SCSS variable resolution and weight-preferred font fallback.
